originalTitle: Weber marks down grills and griddles to their best prices ever for July 4th
summary: If our recent Decoder interview with Weber Blackstone CEO Roger Dahle has you craving freshly grilled meats or veggies, Weber just so happens to have a variety of grills, smokers, griddles, and accessories selling at big discounts ahead of the July 4th holiday. It makes a bunch of models, but we’ve landed on a range […]
content: If our recent Decoder interview with Weber Blackstone CEO Roger Dahle has you craving freshly grilled meats or veggies, Weber just so happens to have a variety of grills, smokers, griddles, and accessories selling at big discounts ahead of the July 4th holiday. It makes a bunch of models, but we’ve landed on a range of grills and griddles at varying price points. Weber is cheaper than other retailers by about $50 on most of these picks, but we’ve noted where you may be able to find them at a comparable price from local hardware stores like Home Depot or Ace. For occasional cookouts in the backyard, the Spirit E-325 is a basic but reliable option with three burners. It’s available in either propane for $499 (usually $549) or natural gas for $549 (usually $599), a signifcant markdown considering how rarely they go on sale. The grilling surface is 360 square inches, enough space for a few burgers for you and your friends, and there’s a 90 square inch warming rack for toasting buns or for more delicate items that you don’t want to be as charred. This version features two searing zones with higher heat output for finishing steaks, a nice addition over the more basic $449 E-310. [Product: Weber Spirit E-325 | https://go.skimresources.com/?id=1025X1701640&xs=1&url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.weber.com%2FUS%2Fen%2Fgas%2Fspirit%2Fspirit-e-325-lp-blk%2F1500789.html, https://go.skimresources.com/?id=1025X1701640&xs=1&url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.weber.com%2FUS%2Fen%2Fgas%2Fspirit%2Fspirit-e-325-ng-blk%2F1500844.html] * If you’re looking for a flattop with a drip catch for oil, there’s a $50 discount available on the Slate 30-inch rust-resistant griddle, bringing the price down to $649, which beats Home Depot’s price by $50. The cooking surface can reach up to 500 degrees and heats up in minutes, with wind guards to make sure everything cooks quickly and evenly. The 30-inch griddle is a good pick for a big party as it can cook about 22 burgers at once, while the larger 36-inch version can cook 30. Only the propane version of the 30-inch griddle is discounted, so you’ll have to go with either a larger or smaller version if you have a natural gas connection. * For a more portable option, there’s a $50 discount happening on the 17-inch tabletop griddle with the same rust-resistant carbon-steel cooking surface as the full-size griddles, but with a smaller $249 price tag. This compact unit is great for camping, and can reach up to 500 degrees Fahrenheit with a disposable propane cylinder that’s not included. The adjustable feet help keep your oil evenly spread, which is handy if you’re cooking on an uneven surface. We spotted this deal at both Home Depot and Ace Hardware if you’re trying to find one locally. * For something deluxe, you can save $100 on the Searwood XL 600, bringing the price down to $1,199. The pellet grill can smoke at temperatures as low as 180 degrees Fahrenheit for long, slow cooks, or sear at up to 600 degrees for burgers and steaks. With 972 square inches of cooking space, Weber estimates that’s enough for 20 burgers if you use both layers. There’s a smaller Searwood 600 that’s also discounted if you need to fit into a small space, but I think having the extra room on the larger version is worth the $200 price difference between the two models.
chineseTitle: 韦伯 (Weber) 将 7 月 4 日烤架和煎锅降至有史以来最优惠价格
chineseSummary: 如果我们最近对 Weber Blackstone 首席执行官 Roger Dahle 的 Decoder 采访让您渴望新鲜烤肉或蔬菜，那么 Weber 恰好在 7 月 4 日假期之前以大幅折扣出售各种烤架、烟熏炉、烤盘和配件。它制作了一堆模型，但我们已经确定了一个范围[...]
chineseContent: 如果我们最近对 Weber Blackstone 首席执行官 Roger Dahle 的 Decoder 采访让您渴望新鲜烤肉或蔬菜，那么 Weber 恰好在 7 月 4 日假期之前以大幅折扣出售各种烤架、烟熏炉、烤盘和配件。它生产了很多型号，但我们已经推出了一系列不同价位的烤架和煎锅。 Weber 的大多数精选商品比其他零售商便宜约 50 美元，但我们注意到您可以从 Home Depot 或 Ace 等当地五金店以相当的价格找到它们。对于偶尔在后院野餐的情况，Spirit E-325 是一个基本但可靠的选择，带有三个燃烧器。丙烷售价为 499 美元（通常为 549 美元），天然气售价为 549 美元（通常为 599 美元），考虑到它们很少出售，这是一个显着的降价。烧烤面积为 360 平方英寸，足以容纳您和您的朋友几个汉堡，还有一个 90 平方英寸的加热架，用于烤面包或您不想烤焦的更精致的食物。该版本具有两个灼热区，具有更高的热量输出，可用于完成牛排，这是对 449 美元的基本版 E-310 的一个很好的补充。 [产品：韦伯精神 E-325 | https://go.skimresources.com/?id=1025X1701640&xs=1&url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.weber.com%2FUS%2Fen%2Fgas%2Fspirit%2Fspirit-e-325-lp-blk%2F1500789.html， https://go.skimresources.com/?id=1025X1701640&xs=1&url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.weber.com%2FUS%2Fen%2Fgas%2Fspirit%2Fspirit-e-325-ng-blk%2F1500844.html] * 如果您正在寻找带有滴油装置的平顶，这里有一个Slate 30 英寸防锈煎锅可享受 50 美元折扣，价格降至 649 美元，比 Home Depot 的价格高出 50 美元。烹饪表面最高可达 500 度，几分钟内即可升温，
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
